title: RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: MONMOUTH RESOURCE CENTER RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a resource drop-in center with the following services: comprehensive information and referral, food boxes, a proof of homelessness document for a free Oregon identification card, prescription expense assistance, hygiene items, diapers, formula, transportation passes, and laundry passes. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1407 Monmouth Independence Highway Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Unrestricted Transportation passes: Once per month for medical appointments, job interviews, or other appointments supported by documentation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 751-1644 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 751-1644 Main phone Main phone (503) 751-1644 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Polk County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Behind Roth's grocery store. Services: Comprehensive Information and Referral Diapers Drop In Centers Food Pantries Formula/Baby Food Laundry Vouchers Personal/Grooming Supplies Prescription Expense Assistance Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues Transportation Passes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MONMOUTH RESOURCE CENTER
